Page Notes: The home page will contain some attention grabbing information along with community information, weather, calls to action, and business spotlights.
The discover page provides historical information about the town and current demographics. Use imagery and include any relevant city events and information.
This page provides a list of local business organizations that are located in the area.

This page contains information about the benefit of joining the chamber and a membership application form. The form will have specific content requirements to be assigned during the course. There are four membership level options of non-profit, bronze, silver, and gold. The different levels have different perks including directory listings, publications, trainings, social media work, luncheons, sponsorships, advertising, etc.

The contact page contains essential and extended contact information for the chamber and its officers and board of directors. This page will have a simple contact us form asking for name, phone, email, and a comment/message area. The page will have some other developmental specifications to provide opportunities for learning.
